name: Ladder Capital Corp
summary: PartI Overview Ladder Capital is an investment grade-rated, internally-managed real estate investment trust (REIT) that is a leader in commercial real estate finance. We originate and invest in a diverse portfolio of commercial real estate and real estate-related assets, focusing on senior secured assets.
